tasks.label: final-lockin-commit-push
tasks.command: bash
args: cd "/mnt/d/HACKATHONS/FORGE2_NMG.LABS/21 June 2026/forge2-qualifier" && git add DEPLOYMENT.md render.yaml backend/render-start.sh frontend/vercel.json .gitignore LOCKIN_REPLACEMENT_TEMPLATES.md backend/vendor_d_backup_1782028662 && git reset .vscode/tasks.json && (git commit -m "chore: cleanup backup vendor and add vercel/render deployment setup" || true) && git push origin main && git rev-parse HEAD && git rev-parse origin/main && git rev-list --left-right --count origin/main...HEAD
